name: Struts: Incomplete validate() Method Definition
description: A Struts ActionForm subclass either does not define a validate() method or defines one that does not call super.validate(), causing the Struts Validator framework's rules to be silently skipped and leaving form input unvalidated.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL[ActionForm_subclass] node overrides or omits validate() without calling super.validate(), causing CONTROL[struts_validator] to be bypassed so INGRESS[form_data] flows to TRANSFORM or STORAGE nodes without framework-level validation
graph_query: INGRESS[form_data]→TRANSFORM|STORAGE without CONTROL[struts_validator] due to missing super.validate()
